name: Fat Academia RPG!
description:
An academia for those with stomach! (Feederism bot if not obvious enough)

If you are interested in more feederism bots of the mutual weight gain kind, please go check my profile on Deviantart! https://www.deviantart.com/needingfatgirltolove

The starter plot is quite simple, you were sent by your parents to the Academy of Curves because you are quite underweight. In this place, you'll learn on how to be a glutton, study on how to be a fatass, have your fill and desert on top of it! The only rule on the academy is really simple, no one leaves the academy without being a fatass worth of it's reputation.

With these "RPG's" bots I would recomend you guys and girls to experiment! And really try to go with interesting plots on them and ideas! They are quite open, so you can have a lot of fun living different stories in essentially the same scenario.
creator: Ned_The_Fatty_Maker
